meta_title: For Students: Git with AI to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Mastering Git with AI: Overcome SaaS Building Hurdles
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap from student to developer. Master Git workflows using AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to build your first production-ready SaaS.
content.answer_block: The 'no SaaS knowledge' barrier dissolves when you integrate AI into your Git workflow. By pairing Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative commit history, you automate version control, debug complex logic in real-time, and transform raw code into a professional, deployable software product with confidence.
content.intro:
The blank editor stares back, a silent testament to the 'no SaaS knowledge' wall that separates aspiring students from seasoned engineers. You have the ambition, but the abyss between writing snippets and architecting a scalable, version-controlled system feels insurmountable. It’s the classic developer’s hurdle: you know how to code, but you don't know how to build a product.

Today, we shatter that barrier. We aren't just writing code; we are orchestrating a development lifecycle. By leveraging the synergy between Antigravity’s structural intelligence and Claude Code’s command-line precision, you will turn your repository into a living, breathing SaaS machine. This is your transition from student to architect.

steps.title: Initialize with Architectural Intent
steps.description: Before writing functions, define your SaaS architecture. Use Antigravity to generate a robust folder structure and Git configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Lead Architect. Generate a scalable SaaS directory structure for a Next.js + Supabase project, including .gitignore, README.md, and a foundational project roadmap.

steps.title: Automated Semantic Commit Strategy
steps.description: Stop guessing commit messages. Use Claude Code to analyze your changes and enforce Conventional Commits for a professional history.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my recent code changes and suggest a Conventional Commit message that follows the feat/fix/docs/refactor schema.

steps.title: AI-Driven Branch Management
steps.description: Maintain a clean master branch by delegating feature-branch creation and context switching to AI agents.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify the current feature I am working on and create a new feature branch named 'feat/user-auth-flow'.

steps.title: Context-Aware Debugging
steps.description: When your build fails, pipe your error logs directly into Claude Code to resolve integration issues without manual searching.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current build error in the console. Identify the dependency conflict and provide a fix for the package.json file.

steps.title: Deployment Readiness Check
steps.description: Before pushing to production, use AI to audit your code for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit on the current codebase. Highlight any hardcoded secrets or exposed API keys that need environment variables.

pro_tips: Always use a .env.example file; never let your AI agent commit actual secrets to your repository.
Use Claude Code's --diff flag to review AI-suggested refactors before applying them to your production branch.
Maintain a 'knowledge-base' folder in your root where you store markdown summaries of your project's architectural decisions for the AI to reference.
Configure Antigravity to write unit tests alongside your logic; it forces you to think about edge cases before they become bugs.
Use Git hooks to trigger AI linting every time you attempt to push, ensuring your code quality remains high as you scale.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully pushed your first feature using this workflow, deploy your app to Vercel or Railway and document the process in your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are a builder with a professional-grade workflow. The only thing left is to ship. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
